patterns.description: The protagonist resolves a supernatural confrontation through logic, reasoning, or philosophical insight rather than using magical tools or physical force.
Spirits are bound by unresolved grievances or hidden truths, and finding peace requires correcting the historical record or acknowledging the real cause of suffering rather than mere ritual.
A physical barrier or hidden object is magically sealed and only becomes accessible after the associated spiritual conflict is resolved.
The commonly known backstory or legend surrounding a mystery is revealed to be false or incomplete upon uncovering physical evidence.
The environmental weather conditions shift from turbulent to calm in direct correlation with the resolution of the central conflict.
